algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived Type IA fire-flow table applicability
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: maximum buildable area and code table calculation. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.ncarb_scenario_theme: maximum buildable area and code table calculation
scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Type IA fire-flow table applicability variant with changed calculation area and reserve target.

query_preferences.meaning: prioritize fire-flow reserve for larger Type IA calculation area

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.

source_task_origin.ncarb_scenario_theme: maximum buildable area and code table calculation

algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Type IA fire-flow table applicability variant with changed calculation area and reserve target.
